page: OVHcloud d2-4 is a virtual server belonging to the Discovery family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by 2 shared Intel vCPUs based on the Haswell core processor architecture, operating at a base frequency of 2.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 4.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB per core, alongside a local 50 GB NVMe SSD for storage. No dedicated GPU is included, and the network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark evaluations place the performance of this instance in the lower tier. Single-core and multi-core CPU tests, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, rank in the bottom 10% of tested hardware. Memory bandwidth is similarly limited, with read-only large block transfers reaching 19.19 GB/sec and write speeds at 14.22 GB/sec. Despite these processing constraints, the local NVMe SSD provides responsive storage access, and the system achieves 2.07 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the d2-4 is positioned as an entry-level, budget-friendly resource. The shared CPU allocation and modest memory capacity make it a highly economical choice for workloads that do not require sustained high-performance compute. It is best suited for lightweight applications, software development testing, basic static web serving, and small-scale background tasks.
description: OVHcloud d2-4 is an entry-level virtual server in the Discovery family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 2 shared Intel vCPUs clocked at 2.0 GHz, 4.0 GB of RAM, and a 50 GB NVMe SSD. Lacking a dedicated GPU, this instance is designed for budget-conscious, low-intensity workloads. Performance benchmarks, including Geekbench and stress-ng, consistently place this server in the lower percentiles, reflecting its shared-resource model. However, the inclusion of local NVMe storage ensures responsive disk I/O for basic operations. Qualitatively, the d2-4 offers a highly cost-effective entry point for non-production environments. It is best suited for lightweight tasks such as software development, testing, basic static web serving, and running simple background scripts.
og_description: OVHcloud d2-4 is an entry-level Discovery server with 2 shared Intel vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and a 50 GB NVMe SSD, designed as a budget-friendly option for basic development and testing workloads.

tagline: An economical, entry-level virtual server with shared Intel processors and local NVMe storage for lightweight development and testing workloads.
